---
title: "Joaquin Gonzalez-Salgado"
image: images/Joaquin.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope-fill   
      text: Email   
      href: mailto:jgsengineer@gmail.com    
    - icon: telephone-fill    
      text: Phone    
      href: tel:+9099047494     
    - icon: linkedin     
      text: LinkedIn     
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joaquin-e-gs/     
    - icon: github     
      text: Github      
      href: https://github.com/jgonzalezsalgado     

---
<<<<<<< HEAD
Welcome to my Engineering Portfolio! I am a rising Junior Engineering major at
[Harvey Mudd College](https://hmc.edu) interested in electrical and computer
engineering (with appreciation for mechanical engineering.) I'm currently doing research alongside the USDA as a hardware/firmware engineer focused on
=======
Welcome to my Portfolio! I am a rising Junior Engineering major at
[Harvey Mudd College](https://hmc.edu) interested in all things electrical and computer
engineering. I work alongside the USDA as a hardware/firmware engineer focused on
>>>>>>> 3c3cb27b188bf237d7f480786729ed3a07359577
creating low-noise analog amplifiers for monitoring insect feeding behavior as
part of the
[Analog Circuitry Engineering (ACE) Lab](https://www.hmc.edu/engineering/undergraduate-research-experiences/matthew-spencer-research-group/). Check out my projects below!

---

```{=html}
<style>
.proj-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
  padding: 1rem 0;
}
.proj-card {
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  display: block;
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease;
}
.proj-card:hover {
  transform: scale(1.045);
  border-color: #aaa;
  background: #f9f9f9;
}
.proj-img {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 4/3;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}
.proj-label {
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
}
.proj-course {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #999;
  margin: 0 0 2px;
}
.proj-name {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #222;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.resume-btn {
  padding: 8px 14px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: inherit;
  background: transparent;
  display: inline-block;
  transition: background 0.2s ease;
}
.resume-btn:hover {
  background: #f5f5f5;
}
</style>

<div class="proj-grid">

  <a href="projects.html#ev-design-team-project" class="proj-card">
    <img class="proj-img" src="images/evcart.jpeg" alt="EV Cart">
    <div class="proj-label">
      <p class="proj-course">E49C</p>
      <p class="proj-name">EV Design Team</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="projects.html#auv-ocean-floor-sonar-mapping" class="proj-card">
    <img class="proj-img" src="images/e80Robot.png" alt="AUV Robot">
    <div class="proj-label">
      <p class="proj-course">E80</p>
      <p class="proj-name">AUV Ocean Floor SONAR</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="projects.html#digital-level" class="proj-card">
    <img class="proj-img" src="images/Digitallevel.png" alt="Digital Level">
    <div class="proj-label">
      <p class="proj-course">E85</p>
      <p class="proj-name">Digital Level</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="projects.html#multicycle-processor" class="proj-card">
    <img class="proj-img" src="images/Multicycleprocessor.png" alt="Multicycle Processor">
    <div class="proj-label">
      <p class="proj-course">E85</p>
      <p class="proj-name">Multicycle Processor</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="projects.html#submersible-robot-with-kp-control" class="proj-card">
    <img class="proj-img" src="images/E79robot.jpg" alt="E79 ROV">
    <div class="proj-label">
      <p class="proj-course">E79</p>
      <p class="proj-name">Submersible ROV</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="projects.html#digital-logic-demonstration-board" class="proj-card">
    <img class="proj-img" src="images/Logicboard.jpeg" alt="Logic Board">
    <div class="proj-label">
      <p class="proj-course">E4</p>
      <p class="proj-name">Logic Demo Board</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="projects.html#e4-machinist-hammer" class="proj-card">
    <img class="proj-img" src="images/hammer.jpg" alt="Machinist Hammer">
    <div class="proj-label">
      <p class="proj-course">E4</p>
      <p class="proj-name">Machinist Hammer</p>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>

<div style="text-align:center; margin: 1.5rem 0 1rem;">
  <a href="Resume.pdf" target="_blank" class="resume-btn">
    Open Full Resume in New Tab
  </a>
</div>

<div style="text-align: center;">
  <iframe
    src="Resume.pdf"
    style="
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 1000px;
      height: 600px;
      border: 1px solid lightgrey;
      border-radius: 15px;
      display: inline-block;
    ">
  </iframe>
</div>
```
